name: How much is my case worth if AI referral cost me a big settlement?
description: Lost fees + damages; $100k-$500k typical for AI malpractice.[3]

mainEntity.name: How much is my case worth if AI referral cost me a big settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost fees + damages; $100k-$500k typical for AI malpractice.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value based on lost recovery (e.g., 33% contingency fee times settlement) plus emotional distress; averages $200k+ for clear negligence. Mata-like errors devalue cases.[3] Factors: documented losses, jurisdiction caps (none in NY). Use expert to appraise. Free evals common.
